ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the stock is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being listed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "open_fixed" REAL /* Opening price (fixed) */,
  "high_fixed" REAL /* Highest price (fixed) */,
  "low_fixed" REAL /* Lowest price (fixed) */,
  "close_fixed" REAL /* Closing price (fixed) */,
  "volume_deal" INTEGER /* Volume of deals */,
  "volume_fb" INTEGER /* Volume of forward buys */,
  "volume_fs" INTEGER /* Volume of forward sells */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the description belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_descriptions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company info record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the info belongs to */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_info_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
